AAM_Gen2_V1.8_SW300_SW310

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference AAM_Gen2_V1.8_SW300_SW310_20210709T162913.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7D6
Receive ID 7D2
Functional Addr 3A
Functional Name CAN Adapter - BAC
